summary: Freight G/L Account Routing feature fully tested. All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend FreightGLRoutingPanel verified on document detail page with classify, re-classify, and override functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in freight_gl_routing_service.py line 453: AttributeError when classifying non-freight documents - recommended_gl was None causing .get() to fail
BC Write Guard returns write_enabled=false confirming production safety
seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents: 98695c83-a7f3-495f-ac8d-bb5405c55a63 (Tumalo Creek freight), b31207c3-4a2b-41e3-97c6-561c850c0893 (Shipping_Document), c3bf1459-e48d-4905-a813-84b02386b9c4 (non-freight AP_Invoice)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Freight G/L Routing feature complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/freight-routing/accounts (lists 9 default accounts), GET /api/freight-routing/accounts/{id}, POST /api/freight-routing/accounts, PUT /api/freight-routing/accounts/{id}, DELETE /api/freight-routing/accounts/{id}, POST /api/freight-routing/classify/{doc_id} (classifies freight doc), POST /api/freight-routing/override/{doc_id} (overrides G/L account), GET /api/freight-routing/stats, GET /api/freight-routing/recent. Frontend panel: FreightGLRoutingPanel.js renders on document detail page with data-testid='freight-gl-panel'. Shows direction badge, confidence %, recommended G/L account, reasoning, and override flow.

GET /api/freight-routing/accounts.evidence: Returns 9 default G/L accounts with proper structure (account_id, gl_number, gl_name, direction, sub_type, enabled)

GET /api/freight-routing/accounts/gl-inb.evidence: Returns account with gl_number=5200-00, gl_name='Inbound Freight - Raw Materials', direction='inbound'

POST /api/freight-routing/accounts.evidence: Creates new account with auto-generated account_id, sets created_at timestamp

PUT /api/freight-routing/accounts/{id}.evidence: Updates account fields, sets updated_at timestamp

DELETE /api/freight-routing/accounts/{id.evidence: Deletes account, returns {status: 'deleted'}, subsequent GET returns 404

POST /api/freight-routing/classify/98695.evidence: is_freight=True, direction detected, recommended_gl returned with gl_number/gl_name/account_id

POST /api/freight-routing/classify/b3120.evidence: Classification returned with is_freight flag and direction

POST /api/freight-routing/classify/c3bf1.evidence: After bug fix: is_freight=false returned for Protiviti (non-freight vendor)

POST /api/freight-routing/override/{doc_.evidence: Override successful - status='overridden', gl_number='6100-00' (Outbound Freight - Customer Orders)

GET /api/freight-routing/stats.evidence: Returns total_classified, freight_documents, non_freight, manual_overrides, by_direction, by_gl_account

GET /api/freight-routing/recent.evidence: Returns list of recent classifications with document_id, is_freight, classified_at

GET /api/bc/write-guard/status.evidence: write_enabled=false, status='blocked', environment='Production' - BC writes are BLOCKED

FreightGLRoutingPanel renders.evidence: Panel displays on document detail page with data-testid='freight-gl-panel'

Classify button.evidence: Re-classify button found with data-testid='freight-classify-btn', triggers classification

Override flow.evidence: Override G/L Account button opens dropdown with all 9 accounts, Save Override/Cancel buttons visible

bug_fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' when classifying non-freight documents
bug_fixed.fix: Changed result.get('recommended_gl', {}).get('gl_number') to use proper None handling: recommended_gl = result.get('recommended_gl') or {}; gl_number = recommended_gl.get('gl_number') if recommended_gl else None

mocked_apis.note: All freight routing APIs use real MongoDB data. BC Write Guard confirms production safety.
